introduction: Facts of life in 1968, some remembered, some forgotten. Based on the diary Lost, by Silvia Escorel, and commented by the author in voice-over through the original letter written 54 years later, addressed to her brother a year and a half younger. Month by month, from January to December, epoch-making events are interspersed with personal experiences of those who lived the demands of that moment with the intensity typical of their twenties.源自：http://etudoverdade.com.br/en/filme/51556-1968--Um-ano-na-vida-
